# Adventure Bike Insurance

> Specialized insurance for adventure and dual-sport motorcycle riders, offered by Contractors Choice Agency — an independent agency licensed in all 50 states. We cover the gaps standard motorcycle policies leave: off-road and dual-use riding, high-value accessories and gear, long-distance and cross-border touring, and agreed-value protection for modified or rare bikes.

## About

- **Brand:** Adventure Bike Insurance (a brand of Contractors Choice Agency)
- **What we do:** Match adventure, dual-sport, and off-road motorcycle riders to coverage built for how they actually ride — on-road and off.
- **Coverage area:** All 50 United States.
- **Phone:** 844-967-5247
- **Email:** josh@contractorschoiceagency.com
- **Address:** 12220 E Riggs Rd, Chandler, AZ 85249
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday, 8am–5pm Arizona (MST)

## What makes us different

- **We solve the off-road exclusion.** Most policies drop comprehensive and collision coverage the moment you leave public roads. We keep physical-damage coverage in force on maintained trails and dual-use terrain.
- **High-limit accessory & gear coverage.** Accessory limits up to $30,000 with non-depreciating options — not the typical $1,000–$3,000 base — covering panniers, skid plates, crash bars, auxiliary lighting, suspension, and riding gear.
- **Touring & cross-border support.** Motorcycle-specific roadside, trip interruption, and short-term international coverage for Baja, the Trans-America Trail, Alaska, and Pan-American touring.
- **Agreed value & total-loss replacement.** Lock your payout in writing up front; recognize modifications instead of a depreciated book value.

## Coverages

- [Dual-Sport & Enduro Insurance](https://adventurebikeinsurance.com/coverages/dual-sport-enduro): On/off-road coverage for plated dual-sport and enduro bikes without the off-road exclusion.
- [Off-Road & Dirt Bike Insurance](https://adventurebikeinsurance.com/coverages/off-road-dirt): Theft, transport, and trail coverage for non-plated dirt bikes.
- [ADV Touring, Roadside & International](https://adventurebikeinsurance.com/coverages/adv-touring-roadside): Heavy-bike roadside, trip interruption, and cross-border touring options.
- [Accessory, Luggage & Gear Coverage](https://adventurebikeinsurance.com/coverages/accessories-gear): High-limit, non-depreciating coverage for farkles and riding gear.
- [Agreed Value & Total-Loss Replacement](https://adventurebikeinsurance.com/coverages/agreed-value-replacement): Agreed-value and new-bike replacement for modified and rare machines.
- [Liability, Medical & Uninsured Motorist](https://adventurebikeinsurance.com/coverages/liability-medical): Core protection with limits that actually protect riders.

## Who we cover

Adventure tourers (BMW GS, KTM Super Adventure, Yamaha Super Ténéré, Honda Africa Twin, Triumph Tiger, Ducati Multistrada), middleweight dual-sports (Ténéré 700, KTM 690/890, Husqvarna 701/Norden, Aprilia Tuareg, KLR 650, DR650, V-Strom), and lightweight/off-road bikes (CRF300L, DR-Z400, KTM EXC, Royal Enfield Himalayan, non-plated MX and enduro bikes).

Get a free, no-obligation quote at https://adventurebikeinsurance.com/quote or call 844-967-5247.
